title: Hemionitis schaffneri
taxonomy: Hemionitis schaffneri is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of fern that belongs to the genus Hemionitis. The genus Hemionitis is part of the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. This plant is native to Mexico and Central America. It is often found in humid, shaded areas with rich soil.
